name: 1000 Seconds
short_description: 1000 Seconds is a roguelike – Defeat enemies, gather resources, and upgrade your orb to escape the temporal limbo, but you only have 1000 seconds to reach the end, so be as fast as possible.
detailed_description:
Escape the temporal limbo in just one thousand seconds in 1000 Seconds, an action roguelike where time is the most valuable artifact. Use your orb to defend yourself against temporal enemies trying to stop you, upgrade it to gain different effects, and don't forget to collect clocks to buy power-ups in shops. But use this resource wisely, as your inventory is limited.

Orbs

You have a friendly orb that needs upgrading. Use special stones to grant it new powers.

Power-ups

You'll open many chests along the way, but only shop chests can give you power-ups to enhance your orb's performance. Don't forget to collect clocks and keys to open these chests.

Try Again

Losing is part of the game, and with each defeat, you'll grow stronger and wiser to face the next challenge.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
